metrics.label: Range @ 90 km/h (Summer)
metrics.description: Real-world range measured at 90 km/h cruise speed in summer conditions (Bjørn Nyland test).

metrics.label: Range @ 120 km/h (Summer)
metrics.description: Real-world range measured at 120 km/h cruise speed in summer conditions.

metrics.label: Range @ 90 km/h (Winter)
metrics.description: Real-world range measured at 90 km/h cruise speed in winter conditions.

metrics.label: Range @ 120 km/h (Winter)
metrics.description: Real-world range measured at 120 km/h cruise speed in winter conditions.

metrics.label: Consumption @ 90 (Summer)
metrics.description: Energy consumption per km at 90 km/h in summer.

metrics.label: Consumption @ 120 (Summer)
metrics.description: Energy consumption per km at 120 km/h in summer.

metrics.label: Battery Capacity
metrics.description: Usable battery capacity as measured during the test.

metrics.label: 75% Charge Range (km)
metrics.description: Range achievable after charging to 75% — Bjørn's effective range metric.

metrics.label: Charge Time to 75%
metrics.description: Time in minutes to charge to 75% from near-empty.

metrics.label: Effective Speed @ 75%
metrics.description: Effective travel speed accounting for charge stops: 75% range ÷ charge time.

metrics.label: 1000 km Trip Time
metrics.description: Total time for a 1000 km road trip including all charging stops (Bjørn's flagship benchmark).

metrics.label: 1000 km Avg Speed
metrics.description: Average speed including charging during the 1000 km trip.

metrics.label: 1000 km Consumption
metrics.description: Average energy consumption during the 1000 km road trip.

metrics.label: Charging Stops (1000 km)
metrics.description: Number of charging stops during the 1000 km trip.

metrics.label: 0–100 km/h
metrics.description: 0–100 km/h acceleration time (rolling start, Bjørn's method).

metrics.label: 0–100 (1 ft start)
metrics.description: 0–100 km/h from 1-foot start (standard drag timing).

metrics.label: Weight
metrics.description: Curb weight as measured on a scale.

metrics.label: Horsepower
metrics.description: Peak system power output in horsepower.

metrics.label: Cabin Noise @ 80 km/h
metrics.description: Cabin noise level at 80 km/h cruise.

metrics.label: Cabin Noise @ 100 km/h
metrics.description: Cabin noise level at 100 km/h cruise.

metrics.label: Cabin Noise @ 120 km/h
metrics.description: Cabin noise level at 120 km/h cruise.

metrics.label: Cabin Noise (Average)
metrics.description: Average cabin noise across 80/100/120 km/h.

metrics.label: Trunk (banana boxes)
metrics.description: Trunk cargo capacity measured in standard banana boxes.

metrics.label: Cargo (seats folded)
metrics.description: Cargo capacity with rear seats folded, in banana boxes.

metrics.label: Braking Distance (100→0)
metrics.description: Braking distance from 100 km/h to standstill.

metrics.label: Battery Degradation
metrics.description: Battery capacity loss as a percentage of original capacity.

metrics.label: Starting Price
metrics.description: Approximate starting MSRP (pre-incentive). Shown in the selected market's currency, or as a USD range across markets in the "All markets" view.

metrics.label: US Launch Year
metrics.description: Year the vehicle became available in the US market.

sourceAttribution: Test data: Bjørn Nyland (bjornyland.com) — reproduced with attribution. Market overlays: community-maintained, approximate prices pre-incentive.
